name: Liveblocks
description: Monitor Liveblocks real-time collaboration infrastructure for room access and security compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Liveblocks at https://liveblocks.io/dashboard
2. Go to API Keys
3. Copy your Secret Key (starts with sk_)
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: Secret Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Liveblocks Dashboard → API Keys (Secret Key)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Liveblocks rooms to audit active collaboration sessions

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Verifies Liveblocks real-time collaboration infrastructure is active
